subject: Magikarp, an orange fish Pokemon leaping from churning water with its mouth open wide
description: An orange fish with yellow fins leaps dramatically from churning blue-white water, mouth gaping wide open. Water splashes and sprays around the leaping fish in dynamic streaks. A second Magikarp appears to be visible beneath or beside the first, also in motion — the scene suggests a group thrashing in shallow water. The art style is detailed and energetic, with strong contrast between the vivid orange fish and the bright blue-white water. The composition captures the absurd, flailing energy the species is known for: vigorous leaping, zero grace, maximum effort.
foreground: Orange fish leaping from water with mouth open, water splashing dramatically
